overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a medieval wizarding school courtyard, featuring students in robes conversing near castle towers adorned with red and gold banners under a partly cloudy sky.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of student group interaction in the courtyard

notable_agents.action: student holding broomstick and gesturing while conversing with companions
two students in green robes standing near the banner pole

entered.detail: tall stone tower with pointed roof and multiple levels
central stone tower with red and gold banners hanging from the walls
stone tower with crenellations and attached banner pole
large vertical banners with red and gold stripes hanging on the castle wall
stone castle wall partially covered in green ivy
strings of small triangular pennant flags suspended between towers
tall wooden pole with hanging fabric banner near the right tower
well-maintained green grass covering the courtyard ground

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval castle courtyard with students in wizard robes gathered in small groups. The scene features impressive gothic architecture with tall stone towers, red and gold banners, and festive pennant strings overhead. The central student holds a broomstick while conversing with companions near a banner pole, while other students stand in the background against the ivy-covered castle walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a steady, immersive gaze across a bustling medieval wizarding school courtyard filled with students in robes. It begins with a wide view of the gothic architecture, where tall stone towers and ivy-covered walls frame the gathering. As the camera lingers, the focus settles on a central student holding a broomstick while conversing with companions near a banner pole. The scene then expands to reveal the festive atmosphere, with red and gold banners and pennant strings stretching overhead against a partly cloudy sky.
